questions.question: What unique debugging feature does Pinia integration in Vue DevTools provide?
options: Real-time diff of store state between renders
Time-travel debugging: click a previous state snapshot to revert the UI
Automatic unit test generation from store actions
Live performance flamegraph for store getters

questions.question: Which Vue DevTools installation method opens a panel embedded inside the app itself?
options: The Chrome Web Store browser extension

questions.question: What should you check in Vue DevTools when the UI is not updating as expected?
options: The router tab for navigation history
The emitted events log for the component
The state tab to confirm if the reactive state actually changed
The performance tab for render time
